root_text.an4.135:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sāvajjena kāyakammena samannāgato hoti, sāvajjena vacīkammena samannāgato hoti, sāvajjena manokammena samannāgato hoti.
root_text.an4.135:2.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo sāvajjo hoti.
root_text.an4.135:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo sāvajjena bahulaṁ kāyakammena samannāgato hoti, appaṁ anavajjena;
root_text.an4.135:3.3: sāvajjena bahulaṁ vacīkammena samannāgato hoti, appaṁ anavajjena;
root_text.an4.135:3.4: sāvajjena bahulaṁ manokammena samannāgato hoti, appaṁ anavajjena.
root_text.an4.135:3.5: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo vajjabahulo hoti.
root_text.an4.135:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo anavajjena bahulaṁ kāyakammena samannāgato hoti, appaṁ sāvajjena;
root_text.an4.135:4.3: anavajjena bahulaṁ vacīkammena samannāgato hoti, appaṁ sāvajjena;
root_text.an4.135:4.4: anavajjena bahulaṁ manokammena samannāgato hoti, appaṁ sāvajjena.
root_text.an4.135:4.5: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo appavajjo hoti.
root_text.an4.135:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo anavajjena kāyakammena samannāgato hoti, anavajjena vacīkammena samannāgato hoti, anavajjena manokammena samannāgato hoti.
root_text.an4.135:5.3: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, puggalo anavajjo hoti.
root_text.an4.135:5.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.135:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.135:1.3: The blameworthy, the mostly blameworthy, the slightly blameworthy, and the blameless.
translation_text.an4.135:2.1: And how is an individual blameworthy?
translation_text.an4.135:2.2: It’s when an individual does things by way of body, speech, and mind that are blameworthy.
translation_text.an4.135:2.3: That’s how an individual is blameworthy.
translation_text.an4.135:3.1: And how is an individual mostly blameworthy?
translation_text.an4.135:3.2: It’s when an individual does things by way of body, speech, and mind that are mostly blameworthy, but occasionally blameless.
translation_text.an4.135:3.5: That’s how an individual is mostly blameworthy.
translation_text.an4.135:4.1: And how is an individual slightly blameworthy?
translation_text.an4.135:4.2: It’s when an individual does things by way of body, speech, and mind that are mostly blameless, but occasionally blameworthy.
translation_text.an4.135:4.5: That’s how an individual is slightly blameworthy.
translation_text.an4.135:5.1: And how is an individual blameless?
translation_text.an4.135:5.2: It’s when an individual does things by way of body, speech, and mind that are blameless.
translation_text.an4.135:5.3: That’s how an individual is blameless.
translation_text.an4.135:5.4: These are the four individuals found in the world.”
